---
title: "uct-benchmark Quick Start"
author: "Jon Cline"
date: " 05 Nov 2025"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: uct-benchmark
---
## Introduction
This is an introduction to the `uct-benchmark` project.

## Analysis
### Load input data
#### Load satellite data
Set up
```{python setup-environment}
import pandas as pd
import polars as pl
import duckdb
from pathlib import Path

from uct_benchmark.config import (
    PROJ_ROOT,
    EXTERNAL_DATA_DIR
)
# input data paths
satellite_data_old_path = \
    PROJ_ROOT / \
        "src" / \
            "data" / \
                "satelliteData_full.csv"

satellite_data_df = pl.read_csv(satellite_data_old_path)

# output data path
satellite_data_new_path = \
    EXTERNAL_DATA_DIR / \
        "satellite_data_full.parquet"

satellite_data_df.shape

satellite_data_df.write_parquet(satellite_data_new_path)
```
